title: OpenAPI v4.0 Suluk Candidate — Document Meta-Schema
description: Validates the STRUCTURE of an OpenAPI v4.0 Suluk candidate document, per the pinned canonical model (SPEC §1) and ADRs C003/C004/C005/C009/C013/C019. CANDIDATE, not official OAS; inner Schema Objects are JSON Schema 2020-12 (validated by that dialect, treated as opaque here). Provisional — confidence ~0.55-0.65; revisable with the ADRs.

paths.description: Map keyed by RFC6570 parseable-profile uriTemplate (C005).

apiResponses.description: Document-level responses reusable across all operations (§5).

webhooks.description: Incoming operations not hosted at the API's own paths (§14, C018).

Server.$comment: Server IDENTITY = a by-name shape primitive (C015 #55); environment URL config is a deployment-layer concern.

PathItem.description: Keyed in paths by its uriTemplate. Each request IS an operation (§1.3/1.4).

requests.description: The operations at this path, keyed by stable name (C009). At least one required.

pathResponses.description: Responses reusable across this pathItem's requests (§5).

Shared.description: Optional per-level inheritance wrapper (C012 #116, @0.55). allOf-composed into each request's parameterSchema.

Request.description: A Request IS an operation (§1.4). DOM handle = its name; ADA identity = its signature (C003/C019).

operationId.description: Optional legacy handle; not the v4 primary identity (C009).

contentType.description: Request body media type(s) — plain IANA media type; params via the content model (§6/§7).

responses.description: Named responses (§5); each carries its own status.

ParameterSchema.description: Per-location typed slots (C004 #20). Each slot is a JSON Schema 2020-12 over that location's instance.

Response.description: Named in its containing map (§5). Most-specific-wins precedence: request > pathResponses > apiResponses (C012 #17b).

status.description: HTTP status, a wildcard like 5XX, or 'default'.

Callback.description: A runtime-expression-keyed map of pathItem-shaped definitions (§14, C018). The enclosing `callbacks` is itself name-keyed: callbacks[name] is one Callback; callbacks[name][expression] is a PathItem.

Components.description: Dynamic-key reusable definitions; the referencing anchor (C013). Keyed by name (C009).

SecurityRequirement.description: Map of securityScheme name -> array of scope strings (referenced BY NAME, C014 #69).

Reference.description: OpenAPI Reference Object (C013 #49); $ref is a JSON-Pointer '#/components/<type>/<name>' resolved BY NAME (C009, C019 Appendix A).

Schema.$comment: A JSON Schema 2020-12 object (or boolean). Treated as opaque here; validated by the 2020-12 dialect (C013). May itself contain a JSON-Schema $ref.

SchemaOrRef.description: Either an inline Schema Object or an OpenAPI Reference Object. anyOf (not oneOf): a {"$ref":…} is structurally valid as both, and the slot+token rule (C019 Appendix A) — not this meta-schema — decides which kind applies.
